hero.title: Yusuf Tetik
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer
hero.description: I develop innovative, scalable web applications with modern web technologies and AI integrations.
hero.contactText: You can reach me through these channels:

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Hello, I'm Yusuf Tetik. I was born in İnegöl, Bursa. I graduated from Süleyman Demirel University, Department of Computer Engineering. I am a developer who values continuous self-improvement, analytical thinking, and solution-oriented approach. Through my internship experiences, university projects, and community work, I have gained a culture of teamwork; I value taking responsibility and effective communication in collaborative environments.
about.paragraph2: I work on full-stack development with modern web technologies. I develop user-oriented, performant, and scalable web applications in the React, Next.js, and Node.js ecosystem. Additionally, in line with my interest in artificial intelligence technologies, I produce AI-supported solutions and effectively use these technologies in the projects I develop.

yakindanelervar.title: Yakında Neler Var?
yakindanelervar.shortDescription: A web application that brings company events and training sessions together on a single platform. Employees can view training and events in list and calendar views; new events/training can be added, updated, and deleted through the admin panel. Developed with Next.js 14 in a full-stack architecture.
yakindanelervar.detailSubtitle: A full-stack web application that brings company events and training together, making it easy to track with calendar and card views.
yakindanelervar.section1: Registration screen: quick account creation and role-based access control for secure admin panel entry.
yakindanelervar.section2: Admin panel: central interface for adding, updating, and deleting events and training; dedicated screens for empty states.
yakindanelervar.section3: User-facing card and calendar views for upcoming events; one-click registration for sessions.
yakindanelervar.imageRegister: Registration page: form fields and role selection for user sign-up.
yakindanelervar.imageAdminEmpty: Admin panel — empty event list state.
yakindanelervar.imageDashboard: Admin panel — event and training management dashboard.
yakindanelervar.imageHome: Home: event cards and quick access.
yakindanelervar.imageCalendar: Calendar view: training and event dates.

yobex.title: YOBEX – Full Stack E-Commerce Platform
yobex.shortDescription: A full-stack e-commerce application where users can sign up and log in, list and search products, add to cart and update, and place orders. Designed with features like product filtering, quick purchase, and guest user functionality, inspired by Hepsiburada-like structure.
yobex.detailSubtitle: A modern e-commerce application featuring product listing, details, cart, and order flows; supporting member/guest user experience.
yobex.section1: Homepage: category-based product lists, search, filters, and featured campaigns for quick discovery.
yobex.section2: Product detail: image gallery, stock info, variant selection, and similar products; one-click add to cart and favorites.
yobex.section3: Login and sign-up flow so users can create accounts and track their shopping from a personal dashboard.
yobex.imageHome: Homepage: category list, search, and campaign areas.
yobex.imageDetail: Product detail page: images, variants, and add to cart.

gymbuddy.title: GymBuddy – Exercise Guide Application
gymbuddy.shortDescription: A fitness guide application where users can search for exercises based on the muscle groups they want to work on and view exercise details. Developed with a modern and simple interface.
gymbuddy.detailSubtitle: A modern fitness guide where you can search for exercises based on the muscle groups you want to work on, examine details, and add them to your program.
gymbuddy.section1: Search by muscle group, equipment, or exercise name; filter results and access step-by-step instructions on the detail page.
gymbuddy.section2: Exercise detail: target muscle, equipment, step-by-step instructions, and visuals to learn correct form.
gymbuddy.section3: Home and results screen: muscle group selection and grid view of matching exercises.
gymbuddy.imageSearch: Search screen: muscle group and exercise search.
gymbuddy.imageDetail: Exercise detail page: target muscle, equipment, and step-by-step instructions.
gymbuddy.imageResult: Search results: exercise cards in grid view.

mindsense.title: MindSense – AI-Powered Education Platform
mindsense.shortDescription: An AI-powered education platform developed with a team of four. Users can perform text, image, and video-based content analysis; offers interactive learning experiences. I was responsible for the entire frontend development process of the project.
mindsense.detailSubtitle: An interactive education platform offering personalized learning experiences to students and educators with AI-powered content analysis.
mindsense.section1: Home: text, image, and video content analysis; summaries, concept maps, and exam questions. Central entry point for students and educators.
mindsense.section2: Training / content analysis flow: pipeline by material type (text/image/video) and personalized study plan creation.
mindsense.section3: Login and sign-up screens; mobile-friendly forms for accessible authentication on all devices.
mindsense.section4: Teacher panel: student mental state analysis and tracking of those who may need support.
mindsense.imageHome: Home: entry to content analysis and learning tools.
mindsense.imageTraining: Training screen: content upload and analysis results.
mindsense.imageTeacher: Teacher panel: student status and class management.

vividcore-ai.title: VividCore AI
vividcore-ai.shortDescription: VividCore AI is a corporate web platform I developed on a paid (freelance) basis for an AI content production company. I chose server-side rendering and a multilingual setup to meet their need for fast load times, smooth UX, and global reach.
vividcore-ai.detailTitle: VividCore AI — Web Platform for an AI Content Company
vividcore-ai.detailIntro: Developed on a paid (freelance) basis, VividCore AI was designed as the digital face of a company that centers AI in visual content production. The project's main focus was to combine a high-performance user experience (UX) with polished animations and global accessibility (multilingual support).
vividcore-ai.highlight1: Speed & Performance: Next.js 14 App Router and server-side rendering (SSR) deliver lightning-fast load times.
vividcore-ai.highlight2: Dynamic Interaction: Framer Motion powers smooth transitions and micro-interactions without overwhelming the user.
vividcore-ai.highlight3: Global Readiness: next-intl integration provides full TR/EN language support and automatic language detection based on user preference.
vividcore-ai.highlight4: Secure Contact: Resend API and Server Actions power a professional contact form with rate limiting, XSS protection, and spam filtering.
vividcore-ai.developmentIntro: The project started with a short discovery phase around client needs and acceptance criteria; then design and technical decisions were carried into implementation.
vividcore-ai.development1: Requirements and scope: I clarified the company's services, target audience, and multilingual / performance requirements.
vividcore-ai.development2: Architecture and tech choice: I set up a fast, accessible, and interactive stack with Next.js 14 App Router (SSR/SEO), next-intl (i18n), and Framer Motion.
vividcore-ai.development3: Implementation and delivery: Component-based development, form integration with Resend, rate limiting and security checks were completed; the site was launched with short revision cycles.
vividcore-ai.technical1: With Next.js 14 App Router, pages are server-side rendered for fast first load and SEO. Layouts and route groups were used for a DRY, maintainable page structure.
vividcore-ai.technical2: next-intl centralizes language files (TR/EN); locale routing and default language from browser preference are handled. All copy is loaded via translation keys.
vividcore-ai.technical3: The contact form is wired to Resend API via a Server Action. Per-request rate limiting, input sanitization, and XSS protection were added; the user sees success and error feedback.
vividcore-ai.technical4: Framer Motion drives page transitions and component enter/exit animations; layoutId and variants keep motion consistent. Animations respect reduced-motion preferences where applicable.
vividcore-ai.imageHome1: Hero Section: Main landing area with headline, short description, and CTA buttons (What We Create, Contact Us).
vividcore-ai.imageHome2: Statistics and About: Follower counts (Total Followers, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram) and the "Who Is Vividcore_AI?" intro section.
vividcore-ai.imageHome3: Services (What We Create): Service cards for Brand Campaigns, Social Media Content, Music & Sound-Driven Videos, and Custom & Personal Requests.
vividcore-ai.imageStats: Our Stats page: Summary cards (Total Views, Monthly Reach, Avg Engagement Rate) and platform breakdown (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram).
vividcore-ai.imageIletisim: Contact page: Form with name, email, subject, and message fields, plus contact details and social links.

nestjs-ecommerce-backend.title: NestJS E-Commerce Backend API
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.shortDescription: A high-performance, scalable RESTful API solution built for modern e-commerce needs. The system is built on NestJS architecture and delivers product management, dynamic cart operations, and secure order flows over a Dockerized infrastructure. It provides a full professional backend experience with JWT-based authentication and Swagger documentation.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.detailSubtitle: RESTful e-commerce backend API built with NestJS, exposing product, cart, authentication, and order endpoints.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.aboutProject: This project was developed to power the backend processes at the heart of an enterprise-level e-commerce system. The focus is on optimizing complex database relationships (Product–Cart–Order), ensuring data security, and providing developer-friendly API documentation.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight1: Modular Architecture: Thanks to NestJS's modular structure, the codebase was designed to be ready for new features (e.g. payment integration) in a sustainable way.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight2: Containerization (Docker): The project's database layer was configured on Docker. This eliminates the "it worked on my machine" problem and provides an isolated, portable development environment.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight3: Advanced Data Modeling: A relational schema was built on PostgreSQL using TypeORM. Cart and order logic was implemented with One-to-Many and Many-to-Many relationships.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight4: Security Layer: User data is stored hashed with bcrypt; session management goes through the authorization layer with JWT (JSON Web Token) and Passport.js strategies.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight5: Automatic Documentation: All API endpoints were integrated with Swagger (OpenAPI). This provides a live test environment and documentation for frontend teams.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.highlight6: Validation & Reliability: Using class-validator and class-transformer, all data entering the API is strictly validated at runtime.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.section1: The project was built using the NestJS (TypeScript) backend framework. It uses PostgreSQL for the database, TypeORM for the ORM layer, and Swagger (OpenAPI) for API documentation. DTOs and validation are handled with class-validator and class-transformer; authentication uses JWT and Passport; password hashing uses bcrypt. Environment variables are managed with ConfigModule.
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.section2: Product API: GET /api/products (list), GET /api/products/:id (detail), POST /api/products (create), PATCH /api/products/:id (update), DELETE /api/products/:id (delete). Cart API uses x-cart-id header for session: POST /api/cart/items (add), GET /api/cart (list), PATCH /api/cart/items/:productId (update quantity), DELETE /api/cart/items/:productId (remove).
nestjs-ecommerce-backend.section3: Auth: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me (Bearer token). Orders: POST /api/orders (create with cartId), GET /api/orders, GET /api/orders/:id. API runs at http://localhost:3000/api; Swagger docs at /api/docs. Can be run with Docker for PostgreSQL and .env configuration.

items.shortDescription: Developed UI for Turkcell Life Portal (demo) task management and event platforms using React and Next.js. Created a full-stack demo with Supabase and presented it to a team of 100+ people. Also built the entire frontend architecture of a To-Do/Jira-style task management application developed by backend interns. Improved user experience by optimizing interface design, component structure, and API integrations.

Received training on Python, FastAPI, and data science tools. Developed the AI-powered education platform MindSense with a team of four and was responsible for the entire frontend part of the project.
Worked on AI and data-oriented business processes. Developed analytical thinking, communication, and time management skills through various meetings and assignments.
Developed RESTful APIs with Node.js and optimized user interface with React Hooks. Gained practical experience in full-stack development with modern web technologies.
